name: Eranium Peering
notes:
We are the new-generation connectivity partner, fully privately owned and funded. We have built a next-generation connectivity fabric across major datacenters in Amsterdam and Frankfurt. [Read more](https://www.eranium.io/about) about our initiative.

We also operate the [ERA-IX](https://www.era-ix.com/) internet exchange platform. AS35133 is our IP transit product that is available on our fabric.

*Stay tuned for our new peering product!*
